human_verification.notes: Issue #1259 requirements and boundary constraints were implemented for defense industrial export controls, including authority sources, scenario coverage, functionality mapping, and escalation paths.

review_notes: All required scenarios are represented and passed.
All required abilities are mapped and validated for quality-safety-and-assurance and cross-industry context.
No retained-implementation runtime claim is made in the pack; explicit separate promotion policy is included.

specialist_owned_evidence: Specialist outputs are constrained to evidence-backed export classification, screening, hold/release boundaries, and escalation artifacts.
Source set includes jurisdiction, contractual clause, sanctions, and evidence-control references with refresh and decay policy in manifest and research summary.
Scenario set explicitly covers missing evidence, hold bypass, repeat findings, policy conflict, adjacent handoff, and tenant adaptation conditions.
notes: Runtime remains `specification-based` and does not claim retained-implementation status.
